commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=012a20aaa90edf482f18a9643d7e3c80f2922cd8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR passes message channel/provider context into embedded payload construction, suppresses exec-like and middleware tool-error warnings for hard-coded chat providers/session keys, updates Telegram docs, and adds focused payload/dispatch regression tests.

PR surface: Source +56, Tests +67, Docs 0. Total +123 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: on the PR branch, a Telegram/chat payload with assistant success text and a lastToolError for exec/bash returns showWarning false before the mutating failure policy runs. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor/maintainer changes plus real chat proof before merge; automation cannot supply the contributor's real Telegram setup evidence.

target.title: fix(runtime): suppress raw internal tool warnings in chats
target.body:
Summary
- Fail closed for exec-like internal tool failure warnings on chat message providers, including Telegram.
- Preserve cron/session diagnostic behavior while keeping raw failed commands, stderr, stack traces, and child output off chat surfaces.
- Pass message channel/provider context into embedded payload construction so direct-message sessions are covered even when their session keys are not channel-prefixed.
- Add regression coverage for Telegram direct sessions using channel-prefixed, main-scope, and per-peer session keys.
- Document Telegram diagnostic hygiene.

Validation
- git diff --check
- Review pass on focused diff
- QA pass on focused diff
- Targeted test command could not execute in this local worktree because dependencies were not installed and the package manager was unavailable; the attempted runner failed before assertions on missing packages. The regression tests are included in this PR for CI execution.
target.author: iamvishnusankar

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
